name: 11L XSA4 + EMA + LoRA TTT + Partial RoPE + GPTQ-lite (dim480) - RETRACTED
author: Nathan Maine
blurb: RETRACTED 2026-04-13. Originally reported val_bpb 1.13112 was computed with LoRA TTT running on val_tokens for 1 epoch without score-first discipline. Same illegal pattern that closed PR #1376 and was flagged on PR #1193 and PR #406 by @MatoTeziTanka. train_gpt.py default changed to TTT_ENABLED=0 for legality. No pre-TTT diagnostic numbers were preserved, so no clean substitute BPB is available.
legality_note: LoRA TTT trained on val_tokens before final eval. Violates score-first discipline per Issue #402 and Issue #677.
